title: Action
description: An Action is the core operation of a business domain — something an Actor performs on a Resource. Actions describe the operations that drive the business forward and produce meaningful state changes.

name.description: The PascalCase name of the action.

description.description: A human-readable explanation of what this action does.

resource.description: The name of the Resource this action is performed on.

input.description: The attributes required as input to perform this action.

output.description: The attributes returned or updated as a result of this action.

examples.name: Publish
examples.description: Publish a draft post to the storefront.

examples.name: Ship
examples.description: Dispatch a fulfilled order to the carrier.
